origin.vampire_fledgling.vampire_fledgli: A newly turned vampire with a small frame, nocturnal strength, and a dangerous hunger.
power.vampire_fledgling.vampire_fledglin: Vampiric Bite
Bite a nearby target to drain their life force. Hold Primary Active to feed. Toggle bad effects with CTRL + Primary Active.
Breathless
You do not need to breathe while submerged in water.
Blood Charm
A hidden resource used by your vampiric abilities.
Fledgling Frame
Your new body is tiny. Requires Pehkui for scaling.
Fledgling Vitality
As a newly turned vampire, your body is still adapting. You have 3 less hearts.
Mist Form
Upon death, you dissolve into mist and cheat death. Speed 2 and invisibility for 10 seconds. 5 minute cooldown.
Nocturnal Vigor
Grants Strength I and Speed I while not exposed to direct sunlight.
Night Vision
Your vampiric senses let you see clearly in the dark.
Sanguine Diet
You can only stomach raw meat and red foods. Anything else makes you sick.
Sun Weakness
Direct sunlight slows and weakens you unless protected by fire resistance.
Shadow Step
Teleport to the target point in front of you.
Children of the Night
Undead creatures see you as one of their own and leave you alone.
Undead Kin
Marks you as a vampire fledgling for undead-related powers.
Unholy Flame
Fire burns through you twice as fast.
